steps.t: An Iron-folk messenger can be found at Zirakazhâr or Ashmargathâl. After aiding the Dwarves of the Haban'akkâ, a messenger of the Iron-folk has arrive…
Hermáth Stormhammer can be found at Khur Azan, the Dim-crossing. After learning of how Hermáth Stormhammer aided the dwarves who battled upon the slop…
